old_exact: personal representative shall use the authority conferred upon the personal 6 representative by this
new_exact: personal representative shall use the authority conferred upon the personal representative by this
source: PDF source (2024ND102.pdf, line 273; page number '6' appears on its own line as page footer and was incorrectly absorbed into running text during OCR ingestion)
evidence: The PDF displays the page number '6' centered on its own line (line 273) followed by a form feed (0x0C), interrupting a long block quotation in paragraph 17. The DB text incorrectly merged this page furniture into the quotation as 'personal 6 representative', creating ungrammatical text. Proper OCR processing should strip page breaks and page numbers.
note: Located in paragraph 17 within an extended quotation from N.D.C.C. § 30.1-18-03(1). This is the only substantive ingestion error found in the opinion.

old_exact:
failed to allege facts showing bias or the existence of an external influence
for
creating an appearance of
disqualification is without merit.
new_exact:
failed to allege facts showing bias or the existence of an external influence
creating an appearance of impropriety. Therefore, his motion for
disqualification is without merit.
note: Critical sentence corruption in DB. The words 'for' and 'creating an appearance of' were split across separate lines, breaking the sentence. Missing words 'impropriety. Therefore, his motion' causing unintelligible text. PDF shows correct flow across the line break (page break at line 64).

old_exact: [¶1] Glenn Solberg appeals from orders denying his motions for relief from jury trial and judgment and for reconsideration, and moves for a disqualification of the Court.
new_exact: [¶1] Glenn Solberg appeals from orders denying his motions for relief from judgment and for reconsideration, and moves for a jury trial and disqualification of the Court.
note: Text order error in ¶1. DB incorrectly lists 'relief from jury trial and judgment' when it should be 'relief from judgment'. Also, 'moves for a disqualification' should be 'moves for a jury trial and disqualification'. This changes the meaning of what motions were denied.

old_exact: Ι
new_exact: I
source: PDF visual inspection + byte count verification in DB text
evidence: Greek capital Iota (U+0399, UTF-8 0xCE 0x99) appears as standalone section header marker. Should be Latin capital I (U+0049) per ND Supreme Court style. Context: between [¶1] paragraph and [¶2] paragraph start.
note: Ingestion error converting visual Roman numeral to Unicode; common OCR artifact.

old_exact: is An award of costs under N.D.C.C. § 28-26-10 discretionary
new_exact: An award of costs under N.D.C.C. § 28-26-10 is discretionary
source: 2024ND85.pdf lines 328-329: 'An award of costs under N.D.C.C. § 28-26-10 is discretionary'
evidence: The PDF source shows the correct form across lines 328-329 with 'is' correctly positioned after '§ 28-26-10'. The DB has 'is' at the beginning ('is An award') and missing after '§ 28-26-10', creating a grammatically malformed sentence. This is a clear word order error in the ingestion process.
note: Word displacement error - the word 'is' appears at the beginning of the sentence instead of after the statute citation. Found in paragraph 19 discussing award of costs discretionary nature.

evidence: The PDF pdftotext extraction shows 'intrudes\non the' at lines 201-202. The preposition 'on' is grammatically correct with 'intrudes' (one intrudes on something), whereas 'in' is incorrect.
